mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO user_follow (user_id, follow_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{followId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_follow WHERE user_id=#{userId} AND follow_id=#{followId}
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM user_follow WHERE user_id=#{userId} AND follow_id=#{followId})
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_follow WHERE user_id=#{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_follow WHERE follow_id=#{userId}
SELECT follow_id FROM user_follow WHERE user_id=#{userId}
SELECT user_id FROM user_follow WHERE follow_id=#{userId}
